name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: White House jobs up for auction
body:
His law firm specializes in protecting Wall Street banks
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Jay Clayton, who Donald Trump has nominated for chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission, has spent his career as a Wall Street insider lobbying for Goldman Sachs and Barclays. Now he's in line to police the same banks whose greed and recklessness led us to the 2008 global economic meltdown, the worst financial disaster since the Great Depression.
[**Sign our petition to reject Jay Clayton as SEC chairman and stop Wall Street's hostile boardroom takeover of our country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a62/43f17890/de117a8c/6200145c/974973908/VEsH/ "http://resistthehostiletakeover.org/?source=ourrev-em170307-subc")
Trump said that he would be tougher on our large financial institutions, holding them accountable and making the system more fair for the middle class and working Americans. During his campaign, he said that Wall Street and Washington were part of the same corrupt system that only he could take down. Yet the evidence proves him to be as corrupt and unbeholden to the American people as the political opponents that he vilified on the campaign trail.
Clayton's ties to Wall Street are deep. His law firm specializes in protecting Wall Street banks, and during the financial crisis he worked as a bailout attorney for Goldman Sachs, where his wife works today as a partner. The SEC chair is supposed to referee Wall Street banks, but Clayton has spent his entire career protecting their interests - and more than half of his family income currently comes from one of them. How can he be trusted to suddenly switch sides and put working Americans first?
Less than 50 days into the Trump presidency, the American people have been subjected to lies, chaos, scandal, and attempts by the administration to violate basic constitutional and human rights. Enough is enough.
[**Reject Jay Clayton as SEC chairman. Your signature helps to show a better way forward for the American people.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a62/43f17890/de117a8c/6200145c/974973908/VEsE/ "http://resistthehostiletakeover.org/?source=ourrev-em170307-subc")
Thank you for standing with us and the more than 120 million Americans who voted for Wall Street accountability.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The GOP's Affordable Care Act bill >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
The GOP has unveiled their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and I wanted to make sure you knew exactly what it entails:
* It would end Medicaid expansion, which experts have cited as the most important tool in the fight to combat substance abuse
* It would give tax breaks to the wealthy, most notably the CEOs of insurance companies
* According to the AARP, it would significantly increase health care costs for older Americans
* It would create higher premiums and punish you with a 30% penalty for gaps in coverage -- like if you lose your job, for example
* It would defund Planned Parenthood, leaving millions without access to life-saving care including cancer screenings

I can't underscore this enough -- this plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act is fundamentally irresponsible, and it would be devastating to families across the country.
[**Please, join me and add your name to say that you oppose the GOP's plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd16/2a380d31/15e86b77/feeaf0/2002160836/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170204_ACA-petition?source=e20170307_ACApetition1_all&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking out on this critically important issue.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hello, The GOP has unveiled their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and I wanted to make sure you knew exactly what it entails: It would end Medicaid expansion, which experts have cited as the most important tool in the fight to combat substance abuse It would give tax breaks to the wealthy, most notably the CEOs of insurance companies According to the AARP, it would significantly increase health care costs for older Americans It would create higher premiums and punish you with a 30% penalty for gaps in coverage -- like if you lose your job, for example * It would defund Planned Parenthood, leaving millions without access to life-saving care including cancer screenings I can't underscore this enough -- this plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act is fundamentally irresponsible, and it would be devastating to families across the country. "" Thank you for speaking out on this critically important issue. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

Friend --

A little over 24 hours ago, we finally saw the Republican plan to replace the Affordable Care Act.

Bottom line: It forces millions of Americans to pay more for less care.

Their proposal would cut Medicaid, defund Planned Parenthood, and force Americans, particularly older Americans, to pay more out of pocket for their medical care -- all so insurance companies can pad their bottom line.

It's also a giant tax cut for the wealthy. Because of course it is.

**Obviously, Democrats in the Senate are going to do everything we can to see it defeated.**

**[But winning this fight won't be easy. So I'm asking you to make sure our lawmakers know you have their backs. Chip in $1 right now.](https://secure.dscc. The Republicans are racing to pass their bill before anyone has time give it the scrutiny it deserves. They're talking about votes as soon as this week.

They're also preparing to spend serious money to target the lawmakers who speak out in opposition.

Already, we've seen reports that conservative groups are spending millions of dollars on new ads attacking Democratic senators -- all in an effort to build support for Trumpcare.

The Republicans have been waiting for this moment for seven years, and they're eager to finish this fight. If we're going to stop them, we have to show that we're just as energized as they are.

name: The White House
subject: The "Affordable" Care Act is Unaffordable
body:
Now is the time to repeal and replace this disaster. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be52db09300ffd0b54add0a6fadb007d16b4d987973951b8bd4570cc45569b12fd8d90877080fc4008da3c56ae26b998889ef4ae23b2176a)

It’s been seven years since Obamacare was passed, and now, more than ever, we are seeing the harmful effects of this disastrous law.

Obamacare has led to higher costs and fewer health insurance options for millions of hard-working Americans. Independent analysis found 41 states faced higher average healthcare deductibles last year, with 17 states facing double-digit rate increases. Nearly one in five Americans have only one insurer offering Obamacare exchange plans.

In just the past year, Obamacare premiums have **increased by 25 percent** on the typical plan and coverage **choices have dropped by 28 percent** as insurers have left the market.

Things are only getting worse. This past year, nearly 20 million American citizens opted not to get healthcare insurance, with 6.5 million paying the penalty and millions more asking for a hardship exemption from the penalty.

**[Support Repeal and Replacement of Obamacare](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be52db09300ffd0b54add0a6fadb007d16b4d987973951b8bd4570cc45569b12fd8d90877080fc4008da3c56ae26b998889ef4ae23b2176a)**
Americans were promised that Obamacare would bring down healthcare costs -- that promise was **_broken_**. Americans were promised they could keep their healthcare plans under Obamacare – that promise was **_broken_**. Americans were promised that Obamacare would not raise taxes on the middle-class – that promise was **_broken_**.

The American people want change and President Donald J. Trump promised to repeal and replace this disaster. That is exactly what the President is working with Congress to achieve. Step up and support the repeal and replacement of Obamacare.

**[Support Repeal and Replacement of Obamacare](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be52db09300ffd0b54add0a6fadb007d16b4d987973951b8bd4570cc45569b12fd8d90877080fc4008da3c56ae26b998889ef4ae23b2176a)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8423629a57889ddb85286c2152ce28f3507183a169da91b439414a89fd1fdfaae85a80296ac2c4a9fd8ebf32988eab4c193fffd84d8ba05b) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8423629a57889ddb704b924eac3933326cd4ccaf2ac12e20165213188ccef3b4b12ad2bc85e7efc1ae4ccec40d9f44967a61f606707bb129)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4b604e8dc4a0f5b075573ce3f3e6e6c1347262a24cd305d08a87f7b6d7e8301865b9ea56a6f55b88b464c2f3a4d6d5ae4)

name: Erika Andiola, OurRevolution.com
subject: We want our whole damn dollar
body:
Paying us less holds our economy back
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Today in America, our sisters of color earn as little as 56 cents on the dollar that white, non-Latino men make. And despite President Obama signing into law the groundbreaking Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act, we aren't closing the gap as fast as we should.
When it comes to supporting working women, the system keeps letting women down. Barriers like unaffordable child care, inadequate paid family leave, and an all-out assault on unions and workplace protections disproportionately and negatively impact women. That's not to mention the plain old ageism and sexism that still pervade our most powerful institutions.
[**Demand that our Congress fight for equal pay and an economy that works for all women. Sign our petition today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a66/43f17890/de65c278/620012cc/1456889294/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/demand-an-economy-that-works-for-all-women?source=em170308-full")
We excel as doctors, attorneys, professors, engineers, organizers. We pay the same taxes, apply for the same loans, and live in the same apartments and homes as our male counterparts. Paying us less holds our economy back, but just as importantly it subjects us to the personal indignity of being told that we are worth less.
I am sick and tired of hearing that my sisters of color must work twice as long for the same pay. We have the power to change this, but only if we stand together. In the words of a mentor and fellow revolutionary, Senator Nina Turner:
_" Ladies, can I just say this -- we want our whole damn dollar!"_
[**Women deserve better. Sign our petition to tell Congress it's time to make equal pay and an economy that works for all women a legislative priority.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a66/43f17890/de65c278/620012cc/1456889294/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/demand-an-economy-that-works-for-all-women?source=em170308-full")
Thank you for standing up to fight with our sisters around the world.
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Political Director
Our Revolution

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: SIGN: Stop Trumpcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Friend,

News and developments have been moving fast. On Monday, we saw the President's dangerous "new" travel ban which plays into the hands of our enemies, and then yesterday the Republicans finally released their new plan to "repeal and replace" the Affordable Care Act. Now we know why they wanted to keep the plan secret for so long -- it would be a disaster for health care in America.

The plan gives a windfall tax break to the wealthiest and an outrageous tax break for the multi -million dollar bonuses that insurance companies pay their CEOs. And it's no surprise who gets the short end of the stick -- the tens of millions of Americans who will either lose their insurance or will have to pay a lot more for a lot less coverage. Among other things, it will totally phase-out Medicaid extension, defund Planned Parenthood, and strip away many of the protections against discrimination based on pre-existing conditions.

Republicans want to ram this bill through Congress before Americans can react to it and before we have the official budget estimates that will show how much it will cost taxpayers. We need to say no!

[**Please join with me by signing your name to reject Trumpcare and its disastrous consequences. Let's make our voices heard now before Republicans in Washington take their next steps to wreck the Affordable Care Act.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b01/70cdc2ba/474c4457/397e361/2319527436/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+join+with+me+by+signing+your+name&utm_campaign=em030817&source=em030817")

[SIGN NOW TO SUPPORT THE ACA](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b01/70cdc2ba/474c4457/397e37e/2319527436/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+NOW+TO+SUPPORT+THE+ACA&utm_campaign=em030817&source=em030817")

The architects of this plan like to say it will 'expand freedom', but in reality it provides a giant tax cut for the wealthiest in our country, while stripping everyday Americans of access to mental healthcare, reproductive services, opioid addiction treatments and affordable coverage. [**We must band together now to defeat this bill and to protect health care in America!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b01/70cdc2ba/474c4457/397e37f/2319527436/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+We+must+band+together+now+to+defeat+this&utm_campaign=em030817&source=em030817")

I will be doing everything I can to stop this destructive plan.

Thank you for taking action.

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b01/70cdc2ba/474c4457/397e37c/2319527436/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em030817&source=em030817")
